Skills.Name: Pyromancy
Skills.Description: Fire mastery. Heat-element spells deal +25% damage when the target is already Burning. Pair with FireBolt, FlamingHands, Kindle, or a flaming-sword proc to set the target alight first, then follow up with a fire spell for the bonus.

Powers.Name: Cinder
Powers.Description: +33% Heat damage to Charred targets. Charred is the post-Burning residue — a target who survived a fire is more fragile to the next one. Stacks additively with Pyromancy's on-Burning bonus when both states are present.

Powers.Name: Charsplit
Powers.Description: +50% melee damage on Charred targets, applied as bonus Heat damage. Charred flesh is brittle — your spells weakened the structure, your blade shears through.

Powers.Name: Scorch Retort
Powers.Description: When an attack on you misses, your fire aura lashes back — 3 Heat damage to the attacker. Reliable retaliation that punishes whiffs.

Powers.Name: Pyroclasm
Powers.Description: Active ability: detonate an adjacent burning target. Their Burning is consumed, and every creature in the 3×3 radius takes (3 × consumed Burning duration) Heat damage. 40-turn cooldown.

Powers.Name: Heart Flame
Powers.Description: Active ability: sacrifice 50% of your current HP. Your next 3 Fire/Heat spells within 5 turns deal +100% bonus damage. 100-turn cooldown.
